## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## PR Title

Use:

`type(scope): summary`

Examples:

- `feat(handoff): add session takeover cards`
- `fix(streaming): stop merging commentary into final output`
- `docs(readme): clarify Telegram image upload flow`
